ksa_text: Operate the Data Governance Council, including scheduling, agenda preparation, issue tracking, decision logging, and follow-through on action items.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-008 (Data Governance/Task) scores 0.431 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.431) and is in_scope for the Master Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Master Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.431), and Data Governance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Governance at composite 0.431 is market-validated for Master Data Manager. Final decision: include.
